chat.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.emptyState: Send a message to start chatting

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoStartDesc: Launch Multi-Model Router when Windows starts
settings.autoStartProxyDesc: Automatically start the API proxy when the app launches
settings.noModels: No models configured. Click "Add Model" to get started.
settings.proxyModeDesc: Default routing mode for API proxy requests
settings.manualModelDesc: Select the model to use in manual mode
settings.proxyApiKeyDesc: API key required to access the proxy endpoint. Leave empty to disable auth.
settings.proxyApiKeyHint: Passed via Authorization: Bearer <key> or x-api-key header
settings.exportPasswordHint: This password encrypts your API keys in the export file.
settings.importPasswordHint: The password used when exporting this file.
settings.importError: Import failed: incorrect password or invalid file.

modelEditor.name: Name
modelEditor.maxRpmHint: Auto and race mode will skip this model after it reaches this many requests in the last 1 minute. Use 0 for unlimited.
modelEditor.maxTpmHint: Auto and race mode will skip this model after input + output tokens in the last 1 minute exceed this value. This is not the single-request max token count or context length. Use 0 for unlimited.
modelEditor.maxRpmWarning: This value is very small. Auto mode may mark the model unavailable quickly.
modelEditor.maxTpmWarning: This value is very small. Values like 50 or 80 will almost disable auto routing. A practical starting point is usually 10000+.

rules.title: Routing Rules
rules.subtitle: Tune how auto mode classifies short prompts, coding tasks, multi-step reasoning, and complex analysis requests.
rules.complexKeywordsDesc: Keywords that indicate complex questions (one per line)
rules.simpleKeywordsDesc: Keywords that indicate simple questions (one per line)
rules.multiStepKeywordsDesc: Keywords indicating multi-step reasoning (one per line)
rules.mathSymbolsDesc: Math symbols that indicate complex content (one per line)
rules.codingKeywordsDesc: Programming-specific keywords that indicate coding tasks (one per line)
rules.reasoningKeywordsDesc: Keywords indicating logical reasoning and analysis (one per line)
rules.thresholdHint: Score >= complex threshold → Complex; Score <= simple threshold → Simple
rules.thresholdInvalid: Simple threshold must stay lower than complex threshold.
